Home / Terms of Use

Terms of Use

Last updated: 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Solopreneur Tools ("the Website"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the Website.

2. Description of Service

The Website provides information, reviews, and resources about tools and services for solopreneurs. Content is provided for informational purposes only and should not be considered professional advice.

3. Intellectual Property

All content on the Website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Solopreneur Tools or its content suppliers and is protected by intellectual property laws.

You may not:

  • Reproduce, distribute, or modify content without permission
  • Use content for commercial purposes without authorization
  • Remove any copyright or proprietary notices

4. User Conduct

When using the Website, you agree not to:

  • Violate any applicable laws or regulations
  • Transmit harmful code or malware
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Website
  • Interfere with the Website's functionality
  • Collect user information without consent

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Website and its content are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee:

  • The accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any content
  • Uninterrupted or error-free access to the Website
  • That the Website will meet your specific requirements

6. Limitation of Liability

Solopreneur Tools shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from:

  • Use or inability to use the Website
  • Any content on the Website
  • Unauthorized access to your data
  • Decisions made based on Website content

7. Third-Party Links

The Website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of any linked sites. Visiting linked websites is at your own risk.

8. Affiliate Relationships

Some links on the Website are affiliate links. We may receive compensation for purchases made through these links. This does not affect our reviews or recommendations. See our Affiliate Disclaimer for more information.

9. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Website constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

10. Governing Law

These Terms of Use shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws, without regard to conflict of law principles.

11. Contact

If you have questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us.
